title: WorkloadSpec
description: A runnable workload specification: a container image, Spark job, serverless function, or stream processor with its entry point and parameters.

kind.description: The execution model: sparkJob, container, function (serverless), or streamProcessor.

image.description: Container image reference or function ARN (e.g. "ghcr.io/org/image:tag").

entrypoint.description: The command or function handler to invoke (e.g. "obfuscate", "handler.main").

params.description: Arbitrary execution parameters passed to the workload at runtime.
